meaning_english: Life / Spirit / Mind. Example: Animate (to give life), Equanimity (mental calmness).
Flower. Example: Anthology (collection of poems/flowers), Anther (pollen part of flower).
Chief / Ruler / Ancient. Example: Monarchy (rule by one), Archaeology (study of ancient things).
Guilt / Blame. Example: Culpable (deserving blame), Exculpate (free from blame).
Suffer / Pain / Grieve. Example: Condolence (expression of sympathy), Dolorous (feeling great sorrow).
Equal / Same. Example: Equivalent (equal in value), Equilibrium (balance).
Stray / Mistake. Example: Error (mistake), Erratic (not regular/straying).
Faith / Trust. Example: Confidence (trust in self), Fidelity (faithfulness).
Pleasing / Thankful. Example: Gratitude (thankfulness), Congratulate (express joy for someone).
Herd / Group / Flock. Example: Gregarious (sociable/likes groups), Segregate (set apart from the group).
Law / Swear. Example: Jury (group of judges), Justify (show to be right).
Language / Tongue. Example: Bilingual (speaking two languages), Linguist (language expert).
Speak / Talk. Example: Eloquent (fluent speaking), Loquacious (talkative).
Light / Clear. Example: Elucidate (make clear), Lucent (glowing with light).
Command / Order. Example: Mandatory (required by law), Demand (insist on).
Form / Shape. Example: Metamorphosis (change of form), Amorphous (shapeless).
Death. Example: Mortal (will die), Immortal (will never die).
All / Every. Example: Omniscient (all-knowing), Omnipotent (all-powerful).
Peace. Example: Pacify (calm down), Pacifist (one who hates war).
Feeling / Suffering / Disease. Example: Empathy (sharing feelings), Pathology (study of disease).
Please / Calm. Example: Placid (calm and peaceful), Placate (make someone less angry).
Fight / Fist. Example: Pugnacious (eager to fight), Repugnant (extremely distasteful).
Holy / Sacred. Example: Sanctuary (holy place), Sacrament (sacred rite).
Know. Example: Science (systematic knowledge), Conscious (aware/knowing).
Sleep. Example: Insomnia (unable to sleep), Somnambulist (sleepwalker).
Wise / Wisdom. Example: Philosophy (love of wisdom), Sophisticated (experienced/wise).
Hold / Keep. Example: Tenacious (holding firmly), Maintain (keep up).
God. Example: Theology (study of religion/God), Atheist (one who disbelieves in God).
True / Truth. Example: Verity (truth), Verdict (true saying/judgment).
Eat / Devour. Example: Voracious (very hungry), Carnivore (meat-eater).
